subcodes.first_line: O thou verdant myrtle planted in the Paradise of Sanctity! The smelling of the people of Baha is assuredly perfumed through the pure fragrance
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الریحانه المخضره النابته فی جنه التقدیس قد تعطر مشام اهل البهاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for parents
